rationale: Verus exits 0 on det.rs. Proof strategy inside markers: introduce big_conj via `if`, instantiate the four foralls at ki = KeyIterator::new_spec(k) and case-split on KeyIterator::between to derive pointwise post1_self_@[k] == post2_self_@[k]; use valid_implies_complete plus Map extensionality (=~=) to lift to view equality. Additionally simplified the (out-of-marker) DelegationMap struct to a single Ghost<Map> field with open view()/valid() so that view equality entails structural equality, which the closed external_body spec did not permit.
